title: When Small Action Errors Matter: Closed-Loop Analysis of Post-Training Quantization for VLA Policies
description: A reproduction-oriented study of post-training quantization for vision-language-action robot policies. The paper analyzes selective W4A8 fake quantization for a GR00T N1.5 policy on LIBERO-10 as a closed-loop policy perturbation problem, emphasizing paired repair/regression rollout analysis and control-theoretic interpretation of small action errors.
